task:
MuseScore 3 is already open with /home/user/Documents/sonatina.mscz — a 4-measure piano piece in 4/4 time.

Export the score as a PDF File (all pages) to exactly /home/user/Documents/sonatina.pdf. The original /home/user/Documents/sonatina.mscz must still exist, and the exported PDF must begin with a valid %PDF- header.

verification.description: Exported sonatina.pdf exists and has a valid %PDF- header
